```{r Aggregating problems}
#| include: false

# Build per-row problem text by invoking the formatter closure registered in
# _formatters.qmd for the corresponding rule id. Each context is a list
# produced by the rule file (e.g. x$dol, x$enrolledAt, x$pathogen_name).
get_problem_text <- function(rule_ids, contexts) {
  ret <- list()
  for (i in seq_along(rule_ids)) {
    id_str <- as.character(rule_ids[i])
    formatter <- formatters$problems[[id_str]]
    translation <- sR$problems[[id_str]]
    ret <- c(ret, list(
      data.frame(problem_text = formatter(translation, contexts[[i]]))))
  }
  ret
}

if (nrow(problems) > 0) {
  # Resolve display identifiers from the keys carried by `problems`.
  # Kept distinct so downstream code can group/iterate on them. The raw
  # `context` list-column rides along for the formatter.
  # Under the schema contract's inheritance rule, patients does NOT

  # carry `hospital_key` directly when `include_department = "full"`
  # (departments already has it via pre-join). Join through departments
  # to reach hospital_key, then join hospitals for the site code.
  patient_lookup <- data$patients |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      data$metadata$departments |>
        dplyr::select(tidyselect::any_of(c(
          "department_key",
          "code", "displayShortName", "orgUnit",
          "hospital_key"))),
      dplyr::join_by("department_key")) |>
    dplyr::rename(
      department_code    = "code",
      department_name    = "displayShortName",
      department_orgunit = "orgUnit") |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      data$metadata$hospitals |>
        dplyr::select("hospital_key", "site_code" = "code"),
      dplyr::join_by("hospital_key")) |>
    dplyr::select(
      "patient_key",
      "patient_id",
      "patient_trackedentity" = "trackedEntity",
      "department_code",
      "department_name",
      "department_orgunit",
      "site_code")

  enrollment_lookup <- data$enrollments |>
    dplyr::select(
      "enrollment_key",
      "enrollment_id" = "enrollment",
      "enrollment_date" = "enrolledAt")

  event_lookup <- data$events |>
    dplyr::select(
      "event_key",
      "event_id" = "event",
      "event_date" = "occurredAt",
      "event_type_key")

  problem_results <- problems |>
    dplyr::distinct() |>
    dplyr::inner_join(patient_lookup, dplyr::join_by("patient_key")) |>
    dplyr::left_join(enrollment_lookup, dplyr::join_by("enrollment_key")) |>
    dplyr::left_join(event_lookup, dplyr::join_by("event_key")) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      event_type = dplyr::case_match(
        as.character(.data$event_type_key),
        "adm" ~ "ADM", "pro" ~ "SUR", "bsi" ~ "BSI",
        "nec" ~ "NEC", "ssi" ~ "SSI", "hap" ~ "HAP",
        "end" ~ "END"),
      problem_text = get_problem_text(.data$rule_id, .data$context))
}
```

```{r Write problems}
#| output: asis

header <- function(text, level, numbered = FALSE) 
  paste0(c(rep("#", level), " ", text, (if(!numbered) " {.unnumbered}"), "\n"), collapse = "")

event_problem_header_prefix <- function(type) {
  switch(
    as.character(type),
    ADM = sR$adm_problem_header_prefix,
    END = sR$end_problem_header_prefix,
    SUR = sR$sur_problem_header_prefix,
    BSI = sR$bsi_problem_header_prefix,
    HAP = sR$hap_problem_header_prefix,
    NEC = sR$nec_problem_header_prefix,
    SSI = sR$ssi_problem_header_prefix)
}

multiple_problems_hint <- function(partner_code, patient_id) {
  mailto_subject <- paste0(
    sR$patient_problem_multiple_hint_email_subject,
    " (",
    sR$neoipc_surveillance_partner_code,
    ": ",
    partner_code,
    ")",
    collapse = "")
  mailto_body <- sprintf(
    sR$patient_problem_multiple_hint_email_body, patient_id)
  mailto_content <- paste0(
    support_email_address,
    "?subject=",
    URLencode(mailto_subject, reserved = TRUE),
    "&body=",
    URLencode(mailto_body, reserved = TRUE))
  sprintf(sR$patient_problem_multiple_hint, mailto_content)
}

report_problems <- NULL

if (exists("problem_results")) {
  report_problems <- problem_results |> dplyr::pull("rule_id") |>
    unique() |> sort()
  report_sites <- problem_results |> dplyr::pull("site_code") |>
    unique() |> sort()
  multiple_report_sites <- length(report_sites) > 1

  # Iterate sites
  for (site in report_sites) {
    if (multiple_report_sites) {
      site_header_level <- 3
      cat(header(site, site_header_level))
    } else {
      site_header_level <- 2
    }

    report_departments <- problem_results |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$site_code == site) |>
      dplyr::select("department_name", "department_orgunit") |>
      dplyr::distinct() |>
      dplyr::arrange(.data$department_name)

    multiple_report_departments <- nrow(report_departments) > 1
    # Iterate departments of the site
    for (dept_index in seq_len(nrow(report_departments))) {
      dept_name <- report_departments[dept_index, "department_name"] |>
        dplyr::pull()
      dept_ou <- report_departments[dept_index, "department_orgunit"] |>
        dplyr::pull()
      if (multiple_report_departments) {
        dept_header_level <- site_header_level + 1
        cat(header(dept_name, dept_header_level))
      } else {
        dept_header_level <- site_header_level
      }

      # If the patient ids contain a numeric part, sort that part numerically
      report_patients <- problem_results |>
        dplyr::filter(.data$site_code == site &
          .data$department_orgunit == dept_ou) |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          patient_id = .data$patient_id,
          patient_trackedentity = .data$patient_trackedentity,
          sort = tidyr::replace_na(
            suppressWarnings(
              as.integer(stringr::str_replace_all(
                .data$patient_id, "[^0-9]", ""))),
            -999),
          .keep = "none") |>
        dplyr::distinct() |>
        dplyr::arrange(.data$sort, .data$patient_id) |>
        dplyr::select(!"sort")

      # Iterate patients of the department
      for (pat_index in seq_len(nrow(report_patients))) {
        pat_id <- report_patients[pat_index, "patient_id"] |> dplyr::pull()
        pat_tei <- report_patients[pat_index, "patient_trackedentity"] |>
          dplyr::pull()
        pat_header_level <- dept_header_level + 1
          cat(header(paste0(
            sR$patient_problem_header_prefix,
            " \"[", pat_id,
            "](https://neoipc.charite.de/dhis-web-tracker-capture/index.html",
            "#/dashboard?program=", NeoIPC_ProgramId,
            "&ou=", dept_ou,
            "&tei=", pat_tei,
            ' "', sR$patient_problem_dashboard_link_description, '")"',
            collapse = ""),
            pat_header_level))

        patient_problems <- problem_results |>
          dplyr::filter(.data$site_code == site &
            .data$department_orgunit == dept_ou &
            .data$patient_trackedentity == pat_tei)

        if (nrow(patient_problems) > 1) {
          cat("::: {.callout-tip}",
            multiple_problems_hint(site, pat_id),
            ":::",
            sep = "\n")
          cat("\n")
        }

        enrolment_problems <- patient_problems |>
          dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$enrollment_id)) |>
          dplyr::distinct() |>
          dplyr::arrange(.data$enrollment_date)

        enrolments_by_id <- enrolment_problems |>
          dplyr::select("enrollment_id", "enrollment_date") |>
          dplyr::distinct() |>
          dplyr::arrange(.data$enrollment_date, .data$enrollment_id)

        non_enrolment_problems <- patient_problems |>
          dplyr::filter(is.na(.data$enrollment_id)) |>
          tidyr::unnest(cols = c("problem_text")) |>
          dplyr::select("rule_id", "problem_text") |>
          dplyr::distinct() |>
          dplyr::arrange(.data$rule_id)

        if (nrow(non_enrolment_problems) > 0) {
          cat(non_enrolment_problems$problem_text, sep = "\n")
          cat("\n")
        }

        # Iterate enrolments of the patient
        if (nrow(enrolments_by_id) > 0)
        for (ep_index in seq_len(nrow(enrolments_by_id))) {
          ep_id <- enrolments_by_id[ep_index, "enrollment_id"] |>
            dplyr::pull()
          ep_date <- enrolments_by_id[ep_index, "enrollment_date"] |>
            dplyr::pull()
          ep_header_level <- pat_header_level + 1
          cat(header(paste0(
            sR$enrolment_problem_header_prefix,
            " ",
            format(ep_date, format = "%x"),
            # Only print the id if the enrolment date is ambiguous
            if (nrow(enrolments_by_id) >
                nrow(enrolments_by_id |>
                  dplyr::select("enrollment_date") |>
                  dplyr::distinct())) {
              paste0(" (", ep_id, ")", collapse = "")
            },
            collapse = ""),
            ep_header_level))

          event_problems <- enrolment_problems |>
            dplyr::filter(.data$enrollment_id == ep_id &
              !is.na(.data$event_id)) |>
            dplyr::distinct() |>
            dplyr::arrange(.data$event_type, .data$event_date)

          event_problems_by_id <- event_problems |>
            dplyr::select("event_id", "event_type", "event_date") |>
            dplyr::distinct() |>
            dplyr::arrange(.data$event_type, .data$event_date)

          non_event_problems <- enrolment_problems |>
            dplyr::filter(.data$enrollment_id == ep_id &
              is.na(.data$event_date)) |>
            tidyr::unnest(cols = c("problem_text")) |>
            dplyr::select("rule_id", "problem_text") |>
            dplyr::distinct() |>
            dplyr::arrange(.data$rule_id)

          if (nrow(non_event_problems) > 0) {
            cat(non_event_problems$problem_text, sep = "\n")
            cat("\n")
          }

          ev_header_level <- ep_header_level + 1
          if (nrow(event_problems_by_id) > 0)
          for (ev_index in seq_len(nrow(event_problems_by_id))) {
            ev_id <- event_problems_by_id[ev_index, "event_id"] |>
              dplyr::pull()
            ev_type <- event_problems_by_id[ev_index, "event_type"] |>
              dplyr::pull()
            ev_date <- event_problems_by_id[ev_index, "event_date"] |>
              dplyr::pull()

            specific_event_problems <- event_problems |>
              dplyr::filter(.data$event_id == ev_id)

            cat(header(
              paste0(
                event_problem_header_prefix(ev_type),
                " ",
                format(ev_date, format = "%x"),
                collapse = ""),
              ev_header_level))

            cat(specific_event_problems |>
              tidyr::unnest(cols = c("problem_text")) |>
              dplyr::pull("problem_text"),
              sep = "\n")
            cat("\n")
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```
